initial_prompt: In the project at {workdir}, this node build_error fails: Missing C/C++ compiler for native addon build — set CC/CXX env vars to available compiler. Reproduce the failure with `env -u CC -u CXX npm test`, diagnose the root cause by reading the project files, and apply a fix so that same command exits 0.

success_criteria.fix_command_test: cd {workdir} && env -u CC -u CXX npm test
